steps.name: Siemplify_Change Alert Priority
steps.description: Automatically change the alert priority to the given input. Note: This action is compatible only with Siemplify version 5.6 and higher.

steps.name: MultiChoiceQuestion
steps.description: This step conditions the progress of the playbook according to a question the analyst has to answer manually, would be used most for questions which can't be answered automatically

steps.description: Add a comment to the case the current alert has been grouped to
